decisive_moments.reason: Clearly establishes the strategic claim and distinguishes exploratory questioning from needless friction, framing the core argument well.
Effectively challenges the pro’s assumption of complexity as the norm and highlights real-world high-stakes workflows where immediate answers are critical.
Reinforces the distinction between exploratory and needless questions and emphasizes trust through transparency, addressing key con objections.
Points out the lack of clear criteria for when to question versus answer and the risk of inconsistent user experience, undermining the pro’s strategic claim.

flags.quote: ‘as AI tackles increasingly complex, open-ended problems, the ability to ask good questions becomes the defining feature of usefulness.’
‘the pro’s claim that questioning consistently improves outcomes across diverse workflows remains unmet.’
